entries.title: BOOKS OF SESSIONS 1 KINGS 17:13 on first-kings 17:13
entries.excerpt: "[First] make me a [little] cake." He certainly did not make this request because he was hungry but to teach the widow that, through the mediation of the priests, some of the first fruits of her crops had to be offered to God. In the same manner Elijah said to the wife of the prophet, "Bring me a full vessel."
